metadata.source: Meridian artifacts (MRL, Control List, CSC-01, CSP SOC 2 report)

tests.testProcedure:
Inspected the configurations within Zephyr Platform backend infrastructure to determine whether the Engineering team had restricted access to the production workspace of each user entity by whitelisting their IP(s).

Inspected the configurations within Quanta Portfolio backend infrastructure to determine whether the Engineering team had restricted access to the production workspace of each user entity by whitelisting their IP(s).
tests.procedure:
Inspected the configurations within Zephyr Platform backend infrastructure to determine whether the Engineering team had restricted access to the production workspace of each user entity by whitelisting their IP(s).

Inspected the configurations within Quanta Portfolio backend infrastructure to determine whether the Engineering team had restricted access to the production workspace of each user entity by whitelisting their IP(s).

tests.testProcedure: For a sample of quarters, inspected the Jira ticket to determine whether the CloudOps team performed a review of the administrative access to AWS, Okta, MongoDB, Datadog, PagerDuty, DevRev, and GitHub and whether the CISO provided sign off.
tests.procedure: For a sample of quarters, inspected the Jira ticket to determine whether the CloudOps team performed a review of the administrative access to AWS, Okta, MongoDB, Datadog, PagerDuty, DevRev, and GitHub and whether the CISO provided sign off.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the configuration within Okta to determine whether access to AWS, GitHub, PagerDuty, DevRev and Datadog is restricted through Okta SSO.
tests.procedure: Inspected the configuration within Okta to determine whether access to AWS, GitHub, PagerDuty, DevRev and Datadog is restricted through Okta SSO.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the configurations to determine whether privileged access to AWS resources hosting Zephyr Platform & Quanta Portfolio infrastructure was restricted and governed through AWS IAM Policies.
tests.procedure: Inspected the configurations to determine whether privileged access to AWS resources hosting Zephyr Platform & Quanta Portfolio infrastructure was restricted and governed through AWS IAM Policies.

tests.testProcedure:
Inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether full backup of AWS RDS was scheduled everyday and was retained for 7 days.

Additionally, inspected the configuration of AWS Backup to determine whether alerts were configured to be logged into AWS CloudWatch.
tests.procedure:
Inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether full backup of AWS RDS was scheduled everyday and was retained for 7 days.

Additionally, inspected the configuration of AWS Backup to determine whether alerts were configured to be logged into AWS CloudWatch.

tests.testProcedure:
Inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether full backup of EBS volume was scheduled everyday and was retained for 93 days.

Additionally, inspected the configuration of AWS Backup to determine whether alerts were configured to be logged into AWS CloudWatch.
tests.procedure:
Inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether full backup of EBS volume was scheduled everyday and was retained for 93 days.

Additionally, inspected the configuration of AWS Backup to determine whether alerts were configured to be logged into AWS CloudWatch.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether replication to other regions of backup copies of AWS RDS and EBS Volume was enabled.
tests.procedure: Inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether replication to other regions of backup copies of AWS RDS and EBS Volume was enabled.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether AWS resources were utilized across multiple availability zones.
tests.procedure: Inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether AWS resources were utilized across multiple availability zones.

tests.testProcedure: For a sample of quarters, inspected the Jira ticket to determine whether the CloudOps Team performed backup restoration and recovery tests of backed up Zephyr Platform & Quanta Portfolio databases and whether the Senior Director of Information Security and Compliance team provided sign-off.
tests.procedure: For a sample of quarters, inspected the Jira ticket to determine whether the CloudOps Team performed backup restoration and recovery tests of backed up Zephyr Platform & Quanta Portfolio databases and whether the Senior Director of Information Security and Compliance team provided sign-off.

tests.testProcedure:
Inspected the DR drill report for Zephyr Platform & Quanta Portfolio products to determine whether a disaster recovery simulation / tabletop exercise was conducted and whether the drill documented controls and test results for infrastructure availability, system and data availability, uninterrupted process flow and training of personnel to handle disaster.

Additionally, inspected the Jira ticket to determine whether the Senior Director of Information Security and Compliance team provided sign-off.
tests.procedure:
Inspected the DR drill report for Zephyr Platform & Quanta Portfolio products to determine whether a disaster recovery simulation / tabletop exercise was conducted and whether the drill documented controls and test results for infrastructure availability, system and data availability, uninterrupted process flow and training of personnel to handle disaster.

Additionally, inspected the Jira ticket to determine whether the Senior Director of Information Security and Compliance team provided sign-off.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether data within AWS was automatically purged based on expiry of lifecycle rules.
tests.procedure: Inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether data within AWS was automatically purged based on expiry of lifecycle rules.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the data flow diagram to determine whether the flow of data between internal components and external entities, including data sources, transmission paths, and system boundaries were tracked.
tests.procedure: Inspected the data flow diagram to determine whether the flow of data between internal components and external entities, including data sources, transmission paths, and system boundaries were tracked.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether AWS WAF was enabled between Zephyr Platform & Quanta Portfolio products and the internet to monitor, filter, and block HTTPS traffic as well as any potential attacks on its web application.
tests.procedure: Inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether AWS WAF was enabled between Zephyr Platform & Quanta Portfolio products and the internet to monitor, filter, and block HTTPS traffic as well as any potential attacks on its web application.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether AWS NAT Gateway was configured to manage and mask internal IPs, and to securely route outbound traffic from internal systems to external networks.
tests.procedure: Inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether AWS NAT Gateway was configured to manage and mask internal IPs, and to securely route outbound traffic from internal systems to external networks.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether AWS Security Groups was configured to restrict access to AWS Console and the services within the AWS cloud environment by whitelisting authorized IPs.
tests.procedure: Inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether AWS Security Groups was configured to restrict access to AWS Console and the services within the AWS cloud environment by whitelisting authorized IPs.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the AWS Security ruleset review Jira ticket to determine whether the CloudOps team performed a review of AWS Security Groups ruleset and whether the Senior Director of Information Security and Compliance team provided sign off.
tests.procedure: Inspected the AWS Security ruleset review Jira ticket to determine whether the CloudOps team performed a review of AWS Security Groups ruleset and whether the Senior Director of Information Security and Compliance team provided sign off.

tests.testProcedure:
Inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether customer managed keys (CMK) were enabled to encrypt data-at-rest within AWS EC2 instances.

Additionally, inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether the customer managed keys (CMK) were configured to be automatically rotated every 365 days.

Further, inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether default encryption provided by AWS was enabled to encrypt data-at-rest within AWS RDS and EBS volumes.
tests.procedure:
Inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether customer managed keys (CMK) were enabled to encrypt data-at-rest within AWS EC2 instances.

Additionally, inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether the customer managed keys (CMK) were configured to be automatically rotated every 365 days.

Further, inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether default encryption provided by AWS was enabled to encrypt data-at-rest within AWS RDS and EBS volumes.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected Zephyr Platform & Quanta Portfolio products certificate to determine whether Zephyr Platform & Quanta Portfolio products were configured to transmit application data over the internet using Hypertext Transfer Protocol Secure (HTTPS) over TLS v1.2 or v1.3.
tests.procedure: Inspected Zephyr Platform & Quanta Portfolio products certificate to determine whether Zephyr Platform & Quanta Portfolio products were configured to transmit application data over the internet using Hypertext Transfer Protocol Secure (HTTPS) over TLS v1.2 or v1.3.

tests.testProcedure:
Inspected the configuration settings within Datadog to determine whether alerts generated by AWS CloudTrail was configured to be re-directed to Datadog.

Additionally, inspected the configuration settings within Datadog to determine whether alerts that cross pre-defined thresholds were configured to be sent as messages to Slack.

Further, for a sample of JIRA tickets related to logging and monitoring of AWS Infrastructure, inspected the ticket to determine whether the CloudOps team analyzed and took necessary corrective actions prior to closing the ticket.
tests.procedure:
Inspected the configuration settings within Datadog to determine whether alerts generated by AWS CloudTrail was configured to be re-directed to Datadog.

Additionally, inspected the configuration settings within Datadog to determine whether alerts that cross pre-defined thresholds were configured to be sent as messages to Slack.

Further, for a sample of JIRA tickets related to logging and monitoring of AWS Infrastructure, inspected the ticket to determine whether the CloudOps team analyzed and took necessary corrective actions prior to closing the ticket.

tests.testProcedure:
Inspected the configuration settings within Luigi to determine whether alerts generated by Zephyr Platform & Quanta Portfolio products were configured to be re-directed to Datadog.

Additionally, inspected the configuration settings within Datadog to determine whether it was configured to automatically send a Slack message and raise PagerDuty incidents when thresholds were exceeded.

Further, for a sample of PagerDuty incidents related to logging and monitoring of Zephyr Platform & Quanta Portfolio products, inspected the ticket to determine whether the Zephyr Platform & Quanta Portfolio Engineering team analyzed and took necessary corrective actions prior to closing the ticket.
tests.procedure:
Inspected the configuration settings within Luigi to determine whether alerts generated by Zephyr Platform & Quanta Portfolio products were configured to be re-directed to Datadog.

Additionally, inspected the configuration settings within Datadog to determine whether it was configured to automatically send a Slack message and raise PagerDuty incidents when thresholds were exceeded.

Further, for a sample of PagerDuty incidents related to logging and monitoring of Zephyr Platform & Quanta Portfolio products, inspected the ticket to determine whether the Zephyr Platform & Quanta Portfolio Engineering team analyzed and took necessary corrective actions prior to closing the ticket.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the CAST AI configurations defined for Zephyr Platform & Quanta Portfolio to determine whether CAST AI was utilized to maintain the capacity for critical production servers and databases hosted on AWS.
tests.procedure: Inspected the CAST AI configurations defined for Zephyr Platform & Quanta Portfolio to determine whether CAST AI was utilized to maintain the capacity for critical production servers and databases hosted on AWS.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the status webpage for Zephyr Platform & Quanta Portfolio products to determine whether application response and availability metrics across all cloud service providers and geographical instances were reported to the user entities.
tests.procedure: Inspected the status webpage for Zephyr Platform & Quanta Portfolio products to determine whether application response and availability metrics across all cloud service providers and geographical instances were reported to the user entities.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the support website for Zephyr Platform & Quanta Portfolio products to determine whether resources such as product documentation, best practices, training materials, guides, troubleshooting tips, and community forums were documented.

tests.testProcedure: For a sample of user entities, inspected the JIRA ticket to determine whether a unique tenancy with administrator accounts to the personnel identified from the user entity organization was provisioned by the CloudOps team based on the details provided in the JIRA ticket.

tests.testProcedure: For a sample of repatriated user entities within the Zephyr Platform & Quanta Portfolio products, inspected the Jira ticket to determine whether the CloudOps team deleted the AWS S3, AWS RDS, AWS Redshift, and MongoDB databases in accordance with the Meridian Tenant Deletion Policy.
tests.procedure: For a sample of repatriated user entities within the Zephyr Platform & Quanta Portfolio products, inspected the Jira ticket to determine whether the CloudOps team deleted the AWS S3, AWS RDS, AWS Redshift, and MongoDB databases in accordance with the Meridian Tenant Deletion Policy.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the customer support workflow to determine whether the reporting and resolution of problems or incidents related to the  Zephyr Platform & Quanta Portfolio products were tracked.
tests.procedure: Inspected the customer support workflow to determine whether the reporting and resolution of problems or incidents related to the  Zephyr Platform & Quanta Portfolio products were tracked.

tests.testProcedure: For a sample of Zephyr Platform & Quanta Portfolio incidents raised by user entities, inspected the DevRev ticket to determine whether resolution was provided by the Customer Support team prior to closing the ticket.
tests.procedure: For a sample of Zephyr Platform & Quanta Portfolio incidents raised by user entities, inspected the DevRev ticket to determine whether resolution was provided by the Customer Support team prior to closing the ticket.

tests.testProcedure:
Inspected the configuration settings within Luigi to determine whether alerts generated by Zephyr Platform & Quanta Portfolio platform was configured to be re-directed to Datadog.

Additionally, for a sample of DevRev tickets related to data ingestion, data duplication, data processing, and / or data export errors, inspected the ticket to determine whether the Customer Support team analyzed and took necessary corrective actions prior to closing the ticket.

tests.testProcedure: For a sample of DevRev tickets related to data ingestion, inspected the ticket to determine whether a row level reconciliation process was executed before and after data ingestion to ensure the completeness and accuracy of the ingested data.

tests.testProcedure: For a sample of new hires, inspected the Appointment Letter and Non Disclosure Agreement (NDA) acknowledgement to determine whether the users had signed and agreed to preserve ethical values and the confidentiality and integrity of information within Meridian.
tests.procedure: For a sample of new hires, inspected the Appointment Letter and Non Disclosure Agreement (NDA) acknowledgement to determine whether the users had signed and agreed to preserve ethical values and the confidentiality and integrity of information within Meridian.

tests.testProcedure:
Performed inquiry with Senior HR Operations Specialist to determine whether formalized employee handbook was published on U-Central and accessible by all users.

Additionally, inspected the employee handbook to determine whether it communicated expected workforce conduct, organizational policies, and associated enforcement procedures.
tests.procedure:
Performed inquiry with Senior HR Operations Specialist to determine whether formalized employee handbook was published on U-Central and accessible by all users.

Additionally, inspected the employee handbook to determine whether it communicated expected workforce conduct, organizational policies, and associated enforcement procedures.

tests.testProcedure: For a sample of new hires, inspected the background verification reports to determine whether background check was performed before the date of hire for parameters such as International Criminal Searches, International Global Watchlist, International Education Verification, and International Employment Verification.
tests.procedure: For a sample of new hires, inspected the background verification reports to determine whether background check was performed before the date of hire for parameters such as International Criminal Searches, International Global Watchlist, International Education Verification, and International Employment Verification.

tests.testProcedure: For a sample of new hires, inspected the technical interview assessment forms to determine whether the skill sets of the candidates were evaluated against the job requirements prior to the hiring of the candidate.
tests.procedure: For a sample of new hires, inspected the technical interview assessment forms to determine whether the skill sets of the candidates were evaluated against the job requirements prior to the hiring of the candidate.

tests.testProcedure:
Inspected the Global Code of Ethics and Business Conduct and Information Security and Compliance training material to determine whether it contained elements of information security policies, security threats overview, email security, password security, and incident management reporting mechanisms during breaches.

Additionally, for a sample of new hires, inspected the training completion records within Mindtickle to determine whether the new hires were made aware of code of conduct and information security and compliance during induction.
tests.procedure:
Inspected the Global Code of Ethics and Business Conduct and Information Security and Compliance training material to determine whether it contained elements of information security policies, security threats overview, email security, password security, and incident management reporting mechanisms during breaches.

tests.testProcedure:
Inspected the refresher Information Security and Compliance training material to determine whether it contained elements of information security policies, security threats overview, email security, password security, and incident management reporting mechanisms during breaches.

Additionally, for a sample of active users, inspected the training completion records within Mindtickle to determine whether the active users completed the refresher trainings.
tests.procedure:
Inspected the refresher Information Security and Compliance training material to determine whether it contained elements of information security policies, security threats overview, email security, password security, and incident management reporting mechanisms during breaches.

Additionally, for a sample of active users, inspected the training completion records within Mindtickle to determine whether the active users completed the refresher trainings.

tests.testProcedure: For a sample of active employees who have been in Meridian for more than six months, inspected the performance evaluation results within Workday to determine whether performance evaluations were carried out by employees and their reporting managers.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the Meridian organizational chart to determine whether Meridian has defined an organizational structure which describes the line of authority and the individual roles and responsibilities.
tests.procedure: Inspected the Meridian organizational chart to determine whether Meridian has defined an organizational structure which describes the line of authority and the individual roles and responsibilities.

tests.testProcedure:
Inquired the Information Security Senior Manager to determine whether the Job Descriptions were updated within Workday and reflect the current job responsibilities.

Additionally, for a sample of Job Descriptions, inspected the job description to determine whether roles and responsibilities were defined.

tests.testProcedure:
Inspected the Risk Management Procedure to determine whether guidelines for the identification, preparation, and categorization of risks to satisfy business information, legal and regulatory requirements were defined and documented.

Additionally, inspected U-Central to determine whether the Risk Management Procedure was published on U-Central and was reviewed and approved by CISO.
tests.procedure:
Inspected the Risk Management Procedure to determine whether guidelines for the identification, preparation, and categorization of risks to satisfy business information, legal and regulatory requirements were defined and documented.

Additionally, inspected U-Central to determine whether the Risk Management Procedure was published on U-Central and was reviewed and approved by CISO.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the Risk Register and corresponding Jira ticket(s) to determine whether the Information Security & Compliance team identified, reviewed, and documented the risks associated with its various functions in context of CIS Critical Security Controls, information security, data integrity, confidentiality, and availability.

tests.testProcedure: For a sample of vendors and third party service providers onboarded during the audit period, inspected the onboarding assessment report to determine whether Information Security & Compliance team assessed whether the vendor meets the third-party information security requirements defined by Meridian.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the Management Review Meeting invites, agenda, and minutes to determine whether the Executive Management, Steering Committee (SSC), CISO, Legal team, Privacy team, and the  Information Security & Compliance teams met annually to ensure security initiatives were in line with company objectives and discussed nonconformities and findings identified during information security internal audits / risk assessments / other assessments, incidents, and their respective corrective actions.

tests.testProcedure:
Performed inquiry with Meridian CISO to determine whether Board of Directors constituted of members independent of Meridian daily operations.

Additionally, inspected the ‘List of Directors’ and Board of Directors structure of Meridian to determine whether the Board of Directors demonstrated independence from Meridian's daily operations.

tests.testProcedure: For sample of quarters inspected the Board of Directors Meeting invites, agenda, and minutes to determine whether matters related to Meridian’s results of operations, projections for the coming quarter, and any major changes were discussed between Board of Directors and key members of management.

tests.testProcedure:
Inspected the Internal Audit Report to determine whether information security and information technology related internal audit was conducted to assess the operating effectiveness of controls related to information security and information technology for Zephyr Platform & Quanta Portfolio, User Access Management, Information Security, Data Privacy, Network Security, Endpoint Security, Physical Security, and Human Resource Security.

Additionally, inspected the relevant Jira tickets to determine whether observations were tracked to closure.

Additionally, inspected the relevant Jira tickets to determine whether observations were tracked to closure.

tests.testProcedure:
Inspected the Data Classification and Handling Procedure to determine whether guidelines to restrict and protect Meridian and its customers' information during storage, processing, and transmission were defined and documented.

Additionally, inspected U-Central to determine whether the Data Classification and Handling Procedure was published on U-Central and was reviewed and approved by CISO.
tests.procedure:
Inspected the Data Classification and Handling Procedure to determine whether guidelines to restrict and protect Meridian and its customers' information during storage, processing, and transmission were defined and documented.

Additionally, inspected U-Central to determine whether the Data Classification and Handling Procedure was published on U-Central and was reviewed and approved by CISO.

tests.testProcedure:
Inspected the Data Retention Policy to determine whether guidelines for storage, retention, and disposal of data were defined and documented.

Additionally, inspected U-Central to determine whether the Data Retention Policy was published on U-Central and was reviewed and approved by CISO.
tests.procedure:
Inspected the Data Retention Policy to determine whether guidelines for storage, retention, and disposal of data were defined and documented.

Additionally, inspected U-Central to determine whether the Data Retention Policy was published on U-Central and was reviewed and approved by CISO.

tests.testProcedure:
Inspected the Data Backup and Restore Policy to determine whether guidelines for performing and restoring backups were defined and documented.

Additionally, inspected U-Central to determine whether the Data Backup and Restore Policy was published on U-Central and was reviewed and approved by CISO.
tests.procedure:
Inspected the Data Backup and Restore Policy to determine whether guidelines for performing and restoring backups were defined and documented.

Additionally, inspected U-Central to determine whether the Data Backup and Restore Policy was published on U-Central and was reviewed and approved by CISO.

tests.testProcedure:
Inspected the Business Continuity and Disaster Recovery Procedure to determine whether guidelines for plan activation, recovery strategy, impact analysis, simulation handling, rollback, and restoration procedures were defined and documented.

Additionally, inspected U-Central to determine whether the Business Continuity Planning and Disaster Recovery Policy was published on U-Central and was reviewed and approved by CISO.
tests.procedure:
Inspected the Business Continuity and Disaster Recovery Procedure to determine whether guidelines for plan activation, recovery strategy, impact analysis, simulation handling, rollback, and restoration procedures were defined and documented.

Additionally, inspected U-Central to determine whether the Business Continuity Planning and Disaster Recovery Policy was published on U-Central and was reviewed and approved by CISO.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the cyber insurance procured by Meridian to determine whether it could offset the financial losses that could occur due to critical security incidents.

tests.testProcedure:
Inspected the Incident Response Procedure to determine whether procedures for reporting, classification, containment, and resolution of security incidents were defined and documented.

Additionally, inspected U-Central to determine whether the Incident Response Procedure was published on U-Central and was reviewed and approved by CISO.

Inspected the Incident Response Procedure to determine whether procedures for reporting, classification, containment, and resolution of security incidents were defined and documented.

Additionally, inspected U-Central to determine whether the Incident Response Procedure was published on U-Central and was reviewed and approved by CISO.

tests.testProcedure:
Inspected the Endpoint Security and Device Hardening Standard to determine whether hardening requirements to secure Meridian's endpoints, network, underlying infrastructure, and other information systems were defined and documented.

Additionally, inspected U-Central to determine whether the Endpoint Security and Device Hardening Standard was published on U-Central and was reviewed and approved by CISO.
tests.procedure:

Additionally, inspected U-Central to determine whether the Endpoint Security and Device Hardening Standard was published on U-Central and was reviewed and approved by CISO.

tests.testProcedure:
Inspected the Whistleblower Policy to determine whether guidelines for employees to report concerns of unethical behaviour, allegations of fraud, or violation of the company's code of business conduct policy, regulatory rules, and laws were defined and documented.

Additionally, inspected U-Central to determine whether the Whistleblower Policy was published on U-Central and was reviewed and approved by CISO.

tests.testProcedure:
Inspected the management approved network diagrams of Bengaluru, Chennai, London, Palo Alto, New York, and Valencia to determine whether firewall was implemented on the delivery center's internet gateway.

Additionally, inspected the configurations within the firewalls to determine whether rules were configured and enforced to:
► ‘deny all’ traffic by default with access enabled for specific services as per business requirements,
► protect against Distributed Denial of Service (DDoS) and IP spoofing attacks, and
► configure Intrusion Prevention System (IPS) and web filters to monitor and prevent intrusion attempts.

► configure Intrusion Prevention System (IPS) and web filters to monitor and prevent intrusion attempts.

tests.procedure: For a sample of data privacy incidents, inspected the breach register to determine whether the breach was acted on in accordance with the established incident response procedures, and whether the affected user entities, regulators, and others, as applicable were notified by the Meridian Privacy Team.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the DPIA reports for Zephyr Platform & Quanta Portfolio products to determine whether Meridian's Privacy Team evaluated and mitigated privacy risks related to the nature, scope, context, purpose, necessity, and proportionality of personal information; data life cycle management; data subject rights; and sub-processors on an annual basis.
tests.procedure: Inspected the DPIA reports for Zephyr Platform & Quanta Portfolio products to determine whether Meridian's Privacy Team evaluated and mitigated privacy risks related to the nature, scope, context, purpose, necessity, and proportionality of personal information; data life cycle management; data subject rights; and sub-processors on an annual basis.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the DPIA reports for Meridian Website and Workday to determine whether Meridian's Privacy Team evaluated and mitigated privacy risks related to the nature, scope, context, purpose, necessity, and proportionality of personal information; data life cycle management; data subject rights; and sub-processors on an annual basis.
tests.procedure: Inspected the DPIA reports for Meridian Website and Workday to determine whether Meridian's Privacy Team evaluated and mitigated privacy risks related to the nature, scope, context, purpose, necessity, and proportionality of personal information; data life cycle management; data subject rights; and sub-processors on an annual basis.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected Meridian website URL (Cookie Notice | Meridian) to determine whether Meridian cookie notice was available on Meridian website and addressed matters related to the type of cookies collected, purpose, lawful ground of processing, and changes to cookie notice.
